creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed. Note that %hd is valid, only leafnode's replacement snprintf 
does not process it.  However, FreeBSD's libc has a working snprintf 
implementation, but 1.11.9 broke the configure test. I am now patching 
config.h with the proper result (which also saves code size). Thank you 
for debugging this and submitting the report.
